invariants: terminal challenge is a fail-closed Design decision, not adoption, retirement, or verification
unproven retain has immutable custody but no semantic or coverage credit
retirement needs independent replay, owner, alias expiry, generated-zero, tombstone, and rollback evidence
active routes are atom-specific and proposal-only

terminal_retirement_challenges.reopen_rule: only a receipt set satisfying all six obligations may propose retirement

retirement_obligations.required_evidence: independent replay proves no behavior or oracle loss
current component owner confirms no live semantic ownership
all aliases have an explicit expiry or absence receipt
regeneration and closed-world scan return zero consumers
immutable tombstone binds source atom and disposition
rollback path restores custody without reactivating Bun authority
